key_findings: ΔAUROC_Random = 0.0100 < 0.05 threshold (Random reweighting does NOT attenuate)
Gate SHOULD_WORK: PASSED - trajectory divergence reflects spurious-specific conflict
interpretation: GroupDRO training significantly reduces trajectory-based minority detection AUROC (0.9436 → 0.6513, Δ=0.29), while variance-matched random reweighting has minimal effect (0.9436 → 0.9336, Δ=0.01). This strongly supports the hypothesis that trajectory divergence reflects spurious-feature conflict specifically, not generic sample hardness. GroupDRO targets spurious reliance, hence the large attenuation. Random reweighting only smooths gradients generically, hence minimal effect.
